Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Site

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Site
public class Site extends SObject

Java class for Site complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Site">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Admin" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdminId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AnalyticsTrackingCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClickjackProtectionLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DailyBandwidthLimit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DailyBandwidthUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DailyRequestTimeLimit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DailyRequestTimeUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestRecordDefaultOwner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestRecordDefaultOwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MonthlyPageViewsEntitlement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowGuestPaymentsApi" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowGuestSupportApi" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowHomePage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowStandardAnswersPages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowStandardIdeasPages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowStandardLookups" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowStandardPortalPages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsAllowStandardSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsBrowserXssProtection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsCachePublicVfPagesInProxies" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsContentSniffingProtection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsCookieConsent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsEnableFeeds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsHasStoredPathPrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsIsSiteDataCloudIntegrationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsIsSiteGAIntegrationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsIsSiteGAIntegrationMigrated" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsRedirectToCustomDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsReferrerPolicyOriginWhenCrossOrigin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SiteDomainPaths" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SiteIframeWhiteListUrls" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SiteType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subdomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UrlPathPrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
